hooks.prompt: A file was just modified. Remind yourself: after completing the current batch of changes, run the verification suite: uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check . && uv run mypy src/ && uv run pytest. Do NOT run it after every single edit — batch your changes first.

hooks.command: mkdir -p claude_log && echo "## Session — $(date '+%H:%M') ($(if [ $(date '+%H') -lt 12 ]; then echo morning; elif [ $(date '+%H') -lt 17 ]; then echo afternoon; else echo evening; fi))" >> claude_log/session-handoff-$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').md

hooks.prompt: Context is about to be compacted. IMMEDIATELY write a mini-handoff using the Edit tool to append to claude_log/session-handoff-$(date -u +%Y-%m-%d).md. Include: ### Done, ### Pending, ### Decisions, ### Gotchas sections. Be concise but complete.

hooks.command: echo '--- Last 5 commits ---' && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null || echo '(no commits yet)' && echo '' && HANDOFF=claude_log/session-handoff-$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').md && if [ -f "$HANDOFF" ]; then echo "--- Today's handoff exists: $HANDOFF ---" && tail -3 "$HANDOFF"; else echo '(no handoff file for today)'; fi

VERSION=$(python3 -c "import re; m=re.search(r'__version__\s*=\s*\"(.+?)\"', open('src/discord_ferry/__init__.py').read()); print(m.group(1) if m else 'unknown')" 2>/dev/null) && echo "--- Project version: v${VERSION} ---"
